Quick Intro

Hear It From Me

A 10-second introduction — who I am and what I build.

Who I Am

About Me

I'm an Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering graduate with a deep passion for DevOps, Cloud Infrastructure, and Artificial Intelligence. While my academic roots are in hardware and embedded systems, my professional journey has led me squarely into the world of modern software delivery and AI.

Currently working as a Plant Engineer at Mahindra & Mahindra, I leverage data analytics, automation, and structured problem-solving to optimize manufacturing operations — skills that translate directly to cloud reliability and infrastructure engineering.

I've built full-stack AI applications using LangChain, RAG pipelines, and OpenAI APIs, end-to-end DevOps pipelines with Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform, and real-time computer vision systems using OpenCV and MediaPipe.

🎯

Plant Engineer — Process & Operations
Mar 2026 – Present
Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd. · Chakan, Pune

  • Applied root-cause analysis frameworks (5-Why, Fishbone) to resolve operational failures, developing problem-solving approach aligned with IT incident management.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams under high-uptime requirements, building operational discipline directly relevant to cloud reliability and SRE roles.

Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd. · Chakan, Pune
